description: CompositionLight blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, detachable collar inside the collar with panel detailing on the inseam, buttoned placket on the front, dark blue overlock detailing, brand name printed and embroidered on the left chest and a curved hemline with striped godet detailing on the side seam FittingSlimWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGet ready for a clean sophisticated look in this light blue shirt from lee. The embroidered branding on the left chest adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
